item.title: Palantir and Dark Enlightnment
item.description:
https://newrepublic.com/post/195904/trump-palantir-data-americans
Who is Peter Thiel
https://newrepublic.com/article/183971/jd-vance-weird-terrifying-techno-authoritarian-ideas
Alex Karp CEO of Palantir
Update: this is now my most downvoted post and I hope the reason is clear enough.
item.dc:creator: Dgsht

item.title: This is not good. Bad. This is very bad.
item.description: https://newrepublic.com/post/195904/trump-palantir-data-americans This is literally Big Brother from dystopian fiction. Literally. I’ve seen interviews with Palantir people. They are unhinged. And very, very eager.
item.dc:creator: siflandollysiflandollyshowROCK

item.title: Prepare to be inspired
item.description: I don’t follow celebrity journalism, but it still shows up on my feed occasionally, and every time I ask why in the name of Hera’s left tit they’re reporting on such banal horseshit. Or maybe that’s just me.

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1367 (pterodactyl crucifixion)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
Bad: The check my mom gave me to help out a bit disappeared from my wallet; I know I didn't deposit it. It's not in any pockets of any pants or shorts I have. This led to an hour long panic attack in the AM before renting the car where I hit my head with two books (softcover and hardcover) about 35 times. Good: The interview for the middle school history teacher position I THINK went well? It was about 45 minutes that flew by, and the head of school liked the idea of Dungeons and Dragons as an extracurricular activity/club for the students. Also got an email afterward from Superstition Meadery that said they want an interview too. Which reminds me, I need to email the head of school and thank them for the interview because, apparently, this is the neurotypical thing to do even though I already thanked her at the end of the interview itself?
So yeah, the good mood was Mania and quickly flattened. Hah.
Except when the bird then bites your ear, but whatever. NBD.
Step into the Hello Kitty yurt to face your judgment before the Khan of Khans.
I absolutely love the scent and taste of lavender.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Why thank you! Cutie. What?" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 5) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride
